title: The Golden Bell Becomes the Goal
description: Enel’s plan threatens all of Skypiea while Luffy and the crew race toward the decisive confrontation.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Enel’s plan threatens all of Skypiea while Luffy and the crew race toward the decisive confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The sight of this country's destruction! Yahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Oh no! What do we do, bird-horse!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A crewmate of the future pirate King,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shouldn't make such a pathetic face!

summary: Enel’s plan threatens all of Skypiea while Luffy and the crew race toward the decisive confrontation.
